zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gifford於1142年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Richard Giffard21歲，母親Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke25歲。她於大約1158年與Peter II Corbucion在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Gifford于1142年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Richard Giffard21岁，母亲Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke25岁。她于大约1158年与Peter II Corbucion在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gifford was born in 1142, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Richard Giffard, was 21 and her mother, Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke, was 25. She married Peter II Corbucion about 1158, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Gifford est née en 1142, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Giffard, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Peter II Corbucion environ 1158, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Gifford 1142 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Giffard 21 und ihre Mutter Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke 25. Sie hat um 1158 in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Peter II Corbucion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gifford è nata il nel 1142 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Richard Giffard, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Peter II Corbucion circa 1158, nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Giffordが1142年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Richard Giffardは21歳，母Alice FitzHugh of Greystokeは25歳であった。約1158年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトでPeter II Corbucionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアビーウデセルトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gifford(이)가 1142년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Giffard(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 Peter II Corbucion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gifford nasceu em 1142, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Giffard, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter II Corbucion aproximadamente 1158, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gifford родилась в 1142 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Giffard было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter II Corbucion около 1158 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gifford nació en 1142, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Giffard, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alice FitzHugh of Greystoke, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Peter II Corbucion aproximadamente 1158, en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
